name: dopa_guard_ext
description: DopeGuard AI Shield Chrome/Brave Extension — Blocks NSFW sites and images.

scripts.copy:static: cpx manifest.json extension && cpx src/popup.html extension && cpx src/blocked.jpg extension && cpx src/dopeguard.jpg extension && cpx src/adult_keywords.js extension && cpx "src/icons/*" extension/icons && cpx "src/model/**/*" extension/model && cpx "src/libs/*" extension/libs
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:es && npm run copy:static && npm run copy:tf
